question: Find all airlines that have fewer than 200 flights.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING count(*)  <  200
gold_sql_original: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING count(*)  <  200
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT T1.Airline FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline HAVING count(*)  <  200
agent_sql: SELECT a.Airline FROM airlines AS a JOIN flights AS f ON a.uid = f.Airline GROUP BY a.Airline HAVING COUNT(*) < 200 LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT a.Airline FROM airlines AS a JOIN flights AS f ON a.uid = f.Airline GROUP BY a.Airline HAVING COUNT(*) < 200 LIMIT 100
agent_answer: The airlines that have fewer than 200 flights are: United Airlines, US Airways, Delta Airlines, Southwest Airlines, and American Airlines. The query returned 12 rows in total.
